opinions_advanced.example: I'm not entirely sure, but I think the store closes at 9.
From what I can tell, she's not happy with the plan.
To be honest, I didn't enjoy the movie that much.
It depends on how much time you have.
I'd say it takes about 30 minutes to get there.

disagreement.example: I see your point, but I think there's a better way.
That's true, however, it doesn't work for everyone.

disagreement.phrase: I'm not so sure about that.
disagreement.example: Hmm, I'm not so sure about that. Let me check.
Actually, I think the meeting is tomorrow, not today.
I respectfully disagree. I think we need more time.

storytelling.example: So what happened was, I missed the bus and had to walk.
You won't believe this, but I ran into my old teacher.
Long story short, we ended up getting lost.
And then out of nowhere, it started raining.
The best part was when he said 'yes'!

daily_life.example: Sorry, I'm running late. I'll be there in 10 minutes.
Good question. Let me think about it. I'll get back to you.
Oh no, it slipped my mind! I was supposed to call her.
I could use some coffee right now.
That name rings a bell. Have we met before?
